# Plan: Agent Dotfolder Architecture

## Context

Agent instruction files currently live at vault root (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`,
`Perplexity.md`, `Grok.md`). This creates disambiguation collisions with vault
notes (`codex.md`), and doesn't follow the established dotfolder convention
already used by `.git/`, `.github/`, `.obsidian/`, `.claude/`, `.vscode/`, `.qodo/`.

The fix: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder. Files inside are invisible to
Obsidian's note graph, can't collide with vault notes, and each folder can grow
independently (settings, levelsets, context bundles). `!/` becomes the shared
commons all agents draw from — hub-and-spoke.

---

## Official Auto-Load Status (per tool documentation)

| Tool | Dotfolder | Auto-load file | Auto-loaded? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official |
| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/config.toml` | Yes — official |
| Grok (xAI) | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Claimed — source uncertain |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official (already done) |
| Qodo (PR review) | repo root | `.pr_agent.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (test gen) | repo root | `.codiumai.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (agents) | repo root | `agent.toml` + `agents/*.toml` | Yes — official |
| CodeRabbit | repo root | `.coderabbit.yaml` | Yes — official |
| Slack CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/hooks.json` + `.slack/config.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Canva CLI | repo root | `canva-app.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Box CLI | repo root | `box.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Deepseek | `.deepseek/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Microsoft (non-Copilot) | `.microsoft/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Meta AI / Llama | `.meta/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Linear | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Google Workspace | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Hugging Face | none (project) | n/a | User cache only |
| Fictive personas | `.bartimaeus/` `.zagreus/` `.persephone/` | none | Manual injection |

**Cross-tool standard:** `AGENTS.md` at repo root is auto-loaded by OpenAI Codex,
GitHub Copilot, and Qodo. Currently only `!/AGENTS.md` exists — create a thin
root-level `AGENTS.md` as a pointer.

---

## Folder Structure (target state)

```text
.claude/
  CLAUDE.md          ← moved from root (official auto-load)
  rules/             ← optional: modular rules auto-loaded by Claude Code
  settings.json      ← already exists
  settings.local.json ← already exists

.gemini/
  GEMINI.md          ← moved from root GEMINI.md (official auto-load)
  settings.json      ← stub (Gemini CLI config)

.codex/
  config.toml        ← stub (official Codex CLI config)
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for OpenAI Codex agents

.grok/
  GROK.md            ← governance shim (matches claimed convention)

.deepseek/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim (manual injection)

.perplexity/
  instructions.md    ← moved from root Perplexity.md

.microsoft/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for full Microsoft AI surface:
                        GitHub Copilot (chat/CLI), Microsoft Copilot (M365),
                        Azure OpenAI, Bing AI, Copilot Studio

.google/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Google ecosystem:
                        Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive,
                        Google Workspace, Gemini (web/API, distinct from CLI)

.meta/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Meta AI surface:
                        Meta AI (WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook), Llama models,
                        Meta AI Studio

.bartimaeus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.zagreus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.persephone/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.slack/
  hooks.json         ← Slack CLI project hooks (auto-loaded by Slack CLI)
  config.json        ← Slack CLI project config

AGENTS.md            ← NEW at root: thin cross-tool pointer to !/AGENTS.md
.pr_agent.toml       ← NEW: Qodo PR review config (auto-loaded)
.codiumai.toml       ← NEW: Qodo test generation config (auto-loaded)
.coderabbit.yaml     ← NEW: CodeRabbit review config (auto-loaded)
canva-app.json       ← NEW: Canva CLI app config (if Canva CLI used)
box.json             ← NEW: Box CLI config (if Box CLI used)
```

---

## Root Cleanup

| File | Action | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | `git mv` → `.claude/CLAUDE.md`, delete root | Official path is `.claude/CLAUDE.md` |
| `GEMINI.md` | `git mv` → `.gemini/GEMINI.md`, delete root | Official path is `.gemini/GEMINI.md` |
| `Perplexity.md` | `git mv` → `.perplexity/instructions.md`, delete root | No auto-load; move to dotfolder |
| `Grok.md` | `git rm` | Empty file (0 bytes); replaced by `.grok/GROK.md` |
| `codex.md` | Leave untouched | Existing vault note — not an agent file |
| `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` | Flag for Logan | Archive copies — Logan decides keep/delete |

---

## File Contents

### Standard shim structure (all non-auto-load files)

Every `instructions.md` / `GROK.md` / etc. follows the 6-block pattern:

1. **Load mechanism** — honest auto-load OR manual injection statement
2. **Identity header** — owner / repo / platform
3. **Governance** — defers to `!/CONSTITUTION.md`; declares capability tier
4. **Role** — agent persona, one paragraph
5. **Conventions pointer** — `See !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md`
6. **See Also** — flat list pointing to `!/` commons

Target: 30–45 lines per file.

### `.codex/config.toml` stub

```toml
# OpenAI Codex CLI project configuration
# See https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-reference
# Governance shim: .codex/instructions.md
# Shared conventions: !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md
```

### `.gemini/settings.json` stub

```json
{
  "// governance": "See .gemini/GEMINI.md and !/CONSTITUTION.md"
}
```

### `.meta/instructions.md`

Governance shim for Meta AI products. Follows standard 6-block pattern.
Role: "The Social Graph" — Meta AI access via WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook
integrations and Llama model deployments. Read/advisory only unless Logan
directs otherwise.

### Fictive personas

`.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` get `instructions.md` stubs with
role TBD by Logan. Placeholder content:

```markdown
# [NAME] — IDAHO-VAULT

**Load mechanism:** Manual injection by Logan.
[...]
**Role:** [Pending Logan's direction — persona not yet formally defined.]
```

---

## Gitignore

**Rule:** IDE/runtime dotfolders are ignored. Agent governance dotfolders are tracked.

| Folder | Status | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.vscode/` | Already gitignored (line 14) | None |
| `.qodo/` | Empty, not in `.gitignore` | Add to `.gitignore` (housekeeping) |
| `.venv/` | Already gitignored | None |
| `.gemini/`, `.codex/`, `.grok/`, etc. | New governance folders | Must be tracked — verify no wildcard catches them |
| `.slack/` | Slack CLI project config | Track (governance/config, not runtime) |

No existing `.gitignore` wildcard rule will catch the new agent folders. The
`.gitignore` ignores named folders explicitly, not by pattern. Safe to proceed.

---

## Execution Order

1. Add `.qodo/` to `.gitignore`
2. `git mv CLAUDE.md .claude/CLAUDE.md`
3. `git mv GEMINI.md .gemini/GEMINI.md` + create `.gemini/settings.json`
4. `git mv Perplexity.md .perplexity/instructions.md`
5. `git rm Grok.md`
6. Create remaining new folders + files:
   `.codex/`, `.grok/`, `.deepseek/`, `.microsoft/`,
   `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/`, `.meta/`
7. Create root `AGENTS.md` (thin pointer to `!/AGENTS.md`)
8. Flag `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` to Logan before touching
9. Single commit on `claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture` branch

---

## Files Modified / Created

| Path | Status |
| --- | --- |
| `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Moved from `CLAUDE.md` |
| `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Moved from `GEMINI.md` |
| `.gemini/settings.json` | New stub |
| `.codex/config.toml` | New stub |
| `.codex/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.grok/GROK.md` | New governance shim |
| `.deepseek/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.perplexity/instructions.md` | Moved from `Perplexity.md` |
| `.microsoft/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Copilot, M365, Azure OpenAI, Bing, Copilot Studio) |
| `.meta/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Meta AI, Llama, Meta AI Studio) |
| `.bartimaeus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.zagreus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.persephone/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `AGENTS.md` (root) | New — thin pointer to `!/AGENTS.md` |
| `.slack/hooks.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project hooks |
| `.slack/config.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project config |
| `.pr_agent.toml` | New stub — Qodo PR review config |
| `.codiumai.toml` | New stub — Qodo test generation config |
| `.coderabbit.yaml` | New stub — CodeRabbit review config |
| `canva-app.json` | New stub — Canva CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `box.json` | New stub — Box CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `CLAUDE.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.claude/`) |
| `GEMINI.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.gemini/`) |

2. **Fictive persona roles** — `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` stubs

file.content:
# Plan: Agent Dotfolder Architecture

## Context

Agent instruction files currently live at vault root (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`,
`Perplexity.md`, `Grok.md`). This creates disambiguation collisions with vault
notes (`codex.md`), and doesn't follow the established dotfolder convention
already used by `.git/`, `.github/`, `.obsidian/`, `.claude/`, `.vscode/`, `.qodo/`.

The fix: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder. Files inside are invisible to
Obsidian's note graph, can't collide with vault notes, and each folder can grow
independently (settings, levelsets, context bundles). `!/` becomes the shared
commons all agents draw from — hub-and-spoke.

---

## Official Auto-Load Status (per tool documentation)

| Tool | Dotfolder | Auto-load file | Auto-loaded? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official |
| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/config.toml` | Yes — official |
| Grok (xAI) | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Claimed — source uncertain |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official (already done) |
| Qodo (PR review) | repo root | `.pr_agent.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (test gen) | repo root | `.codiumai.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (agents) | repo root | `agent.toml` + `agents/*.toml` | Yes — official |
| CodeRabbit | repo root | `.coderabbit.yaml` | Yes — official |
| Slack CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/hooks.json` + `.slack/config.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Canva CLI | repo root | `canva-app.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Box CLI | repo root | `box.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Deepseek | `.deepseek/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Microsoft (non-Copilot) | `.microsoft/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Meta AI / Llama | `.meta/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Linear | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Google Workspace / Gemini web | `.google/` | manual injection shim | No official CLI dotfolder; shim created by convention |
| Hugging Face | none (project) | n/a | User cache only |
| Fictive personas | `.bartimaeus/` `.zagreus/` `.persephone/` | none | Manual injection |

**Cross-tool standard:** `AGENTS.md` at repo root is auto-loaded by OpenAI Codex,
GitHub Copilot, and Qodo. Currently only `!/AGENTS.md` exists — create a thin
root-level `AGENTS.md` as a pointer.

---

## Folder Structure (target state)

```text
.claude/
  CLAUDE.md          ← moved from root (official auto-load)
  rules/             ← optional: modular rules auto-loaded by Claude Code
  settings.json      ← already exists
  settings.local.json ← already exists

.gemini/

  settings.json      ← stub (Gemini CLI config)

.codex/
  config.toml        ← stub (official Codex CLI config)
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for OpenAI Codex agents

.grok/
  GROK.md            ← governance shim (matches claimed convention)

.deepseek/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim (manual injection)

.perplexity/
  instructions.md    ← moved from root Perplexity.md

.microsoft/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for full Microsoft AI surface:
                        GitHub Copilot (chat/CLI), Microsoft Copilot (M365),
                        Azure OpenAI, Bing AI, Copilot Studio

.google/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Google ecosystem:
                        Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive,
                        Google Workspace, Gemini (web/API, distinct from CLI)

.meta/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Meta AI surface:
                        Meta AI (WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook), Llama models,
                        Meta AI Studio

.bartimaeus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.zagreus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.persephone/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.slack/
  hooks.json         ← Slack CLI project hooks (auto-loaded by Slack CLI)
  config.json        ← Slack CLI project config

AGENTS.md            ← NEW at root: thin cross-tool pointer to !/AGENTS.md
.pr_agent.toml       ← NEW: Qodo PR review config (auto-loaded)
.codiumai.toml       ← NEW: Qodo test generation config (auto-loaded)
.coderabbit.yaml     ← NEW: CodeRabbit review config (auto-loaded)
canva-app.json       ← NEW: Canva CLI app config (if Canva CLI used)
box.json             ← NEW: Box CLI config (if Box CLI used)
```

---

## Root Cleanup

| File | Action | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | `git mv` → `.claude/CLAUDE.md`, delete root | Official path is `.claude/CLAUDE.md` |

| `codex.md` | Leave untouched | Existing vault note — not an agent file |
| `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` | Flag for Logan | Archive copies — Logan decides keep/delete |

---

## File Contents

### Standard shim structure (all non-auto-load files)

Every `instructions.md` / `GROK.md` / etc. follows the 6-block pattern:

1. **Load mechanism** — honest auto-load OR manual injection statement
2. **Identity header** — owner / repo / platform
3. **Governance** — defers to `!/CONSTITUTION.md`; declares capability tier
4. **Role** — agent persona, one paragraph
5. **Conventions pointer** — `See !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md`
6. **See Also** — flat list pointing to `!/` commons

Target: 30–45 lines per file.

### `.codex/config.toml` stub

```toml
# OpenAI Codex CLI project configuration
# See https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-reference
# Governance shim: .codex/instructions.md
# Shared conventions: !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md
```

### `.gemini/settings.json` stub

```json
{
  "// governance": "See .gemini/GEMINI.md and !/CONSTITUTION.md"
}
```

### `.meta/instructions.md`

Governance shim for Meta AI products. Follows standard 6-block pattern.
Role: "The Social Graph" — Meta AI access via WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook
integrations and Llama model deployments. Read/advisory only unless Logan
directs otherwise.

### Fictive personas

`.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` get `instructions.md` stubs with
role TBD by Logan. Placeholder content:

```markdown
# [NAME] — IDAHO-VAULT

**Load mechanism:** Manual injection by Logan.
[...]
**Role:** [Pending Logan's direction — persona not yet formally defined.]
```

---

## Gitignore

**Rule:** IDE/runtime dotfolders are ignored. Agent governance dotfolders are tracked.

| Folder | Status | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.vscode/` | Already gitignored (line 14) | None |
| `.qodo/` | Empty, not in `.gitignore` | Add to `.gitignore` (housekeeping) |

| `.slack/` | Slack CLI project config | Track (governance/config, not runtime) |

No existing `.gitignore` wildcard rule will catch the new agent folders. The

---

1. Add `.qodo/` to `.gitignore`
2. `git mv CLAUDE.md .claude/CLAUDE.md`
3. `git mv GEMINI.md .gemini/GEMINI.md` + create `.gemini/settings.json`
4. `git mv Perplexity.md .perplexity/instructions.md`
5. `git rm Grok.md`
6. Create remaining new folders + files:
   `.codex/`, `.grok/`, `.deepseek/`, `.microsoft/`,
   `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/`, `.meta/`
7. Create root `AGENTS.md` (thin pointer to `!/AGENTS.md`)
8. Flag `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` to Logan before touching
9. Single commit on `claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture` branch

# Plan: Agent Dotfolder Architecture

## Context

Agent instruction files currently live at vault root (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`,
`Perplexity.md`, `Grok.md`). This creates disambiguation collisions with vault
notes (`codex.md`), and doesn't follow the established dotfolder convention
already used by `.git/`, `.github/`, `.obsidian/`, `.claude/`, `.vscode/`, `.qodo/`.

The fix: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder. Files inside are invisible to
Obsidian's note graph, can't collide with vault notes, and each folder can grow
independently (settings, levelsets, context bundles). `!/` becomes the shared
commons all agents draw from — hub-and-spoke.

---

## Official Auto-Load Status (per tool documentation)

| Tool | Dotfolder | Auto-load file | Auto-loaded? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official |
| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/config.toml` | Yes — official |
| Grok (xAI) | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Claimed — source uncertain |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official (already done) |
| Qodo (PR review) | repo root | `.pr_agent.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (test gen) | repo root | `.codiumai.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (agents) | repo root | `agent.toml` + `agents/*.toml` | Yes — official |
| CodeRabbit | repo root | `.coderabbit.yaml` | Yes — official |
| Slack CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/hooks.json` + `.slack/config.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Canva CLI | repo root | `canva-app.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Box CLI | repo root | `box.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Deepseek | `.deepseek/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Microsoft (non-Copilot) | `.microsoft/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Meta AI / Llama | `.meta/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Linear | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Google Workspace / Gemini web | `.google/` | manual injection shim | No official CLI dotfolder; shim created by convention |
| Hugging Face | none (project) | n/a | User cache only |
| Fictive personas | `.bartimaeus/` `.zagreus/` `.persephone/` | none | Manual injection |

**Cross-tool standard:** `AGENTS.md` at repo root is auto-loaded by OpenAI Codex,
GitHub Copilot, and Qodo. Currently only `!/AGENTS.md` exists — create a thin
root-level `AGENTS.md` as a pointer.

---

## Folder Structure (target state)

```text
.claude/
  CLAUDE.md          ← moved from root (official auto-load)
  rules/             ← optional: modular rules auto-loaded by Claude Code
  settings.json      ← already exists
  settings.local.json ← already exists

.gemini/
  GEMINI.md          ← moved from root GEMINI.md (official auto-load)
  settings.json      ← stub (Gemini CLI config)

.codex/
  config.toml        ← stub (official Codex CLI config)
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for OpenAI Codex agents

.grok/
  GROK.md            ← governance shim (matches claimed convention)

.deepseek/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim (manual injection)

.perplexity/
  instructions.md    ← moved from root Perplexity.md

.microsoft/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for full Microsoft AI surface:
                        GitHub Copilot (chat/CLI), Microsoft Copilot (M365),
                        Azure OpenAI, Bing AI, Copilot Studio

.google/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Google ecosystem:
                        Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive,
                        Google Workspace, Gemini (web/API, distinct from CLI)

.meta/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Meta AI surface:
                        Meta AI (WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook), Llama models,
                        Meta AI Studio

.bartimaeus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.zagreus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.persephone/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.slack/
  hooks.json         ← Slack CLI project hooks (auto-loaded by Slack CLI)
  config.json        ← Slack CLI project config

AGENTS.md            ← NEW at root: thin cross-tool pointer to !/AGENTS.md
.pr_agent.toml       ← NEW: Qodo PR review config (auto-loaded)
.codiumai.toml       ← NEW: Qodo test generation config (auto-loaded)
.coderabbit.yaml     ← NEW: CodeRabbit review config (auto-loaded)
canva-app.json       ← NEW: Canva CLI app config (if Canva CLI used)
box.json             ← NEW: Box CLI config (if Box CLI used)
```

---

## Root Cleanup

| File | Action | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | `git mv` → `.claude/CLAUDE.md`, delete root | Official path is `.claude/CLAUDE.md` |
| `GEMINI.md` | `git mv` → `.gemini/GEMINI.md`, delete root | Official path is `.gemini/GEMINI.md` |
| `Perplexity.md` | `git mv` → `.perplexity/instructions.md`, delete root | No auto-load; move to dotfolder |
| `Grok.md` | `git rm` | Empty file (0 bytes); replaced by `.grok/GROK.md` |
| `codex.md` | Leave untouched | Existing vault note — not an agent file |
| `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` | Flag for Logan | Archive copies — Logan decides keep/delete |

---

## File Contents

### Standard shim structure (all non-auto-load files)

Every `instructions.md` / `GROK.md` / etc. follows the 6-block pattern:

1. **Load mechanism** — honest auto-load OR manual injection statement
2. **Identity header** — owner / repo / platform
3. **Governance** — defers to `!/CONSTITUTION.md`; declares capability tier
4. **Role** — agent persona, one paragraph
5. **Conventions pointer** — `See !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md`
6. **See Also** — flat list pointing to `!/` commons

Target: 30–45 lines per file.

### `.codex/config.toml` stub

```toml
# OpenAI Codex CLI project configuration
# See https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-reference
# Governance shim: .codex/instructions.md
# Shared conventions: !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md
```

### `.gemini/settings.json` stub

```json
{
  "// governance": "See .gemini/GEMINI.md and !/CONSTITUTION.md"
}
```

### `.meta/instructions.md`

Governance shim for Meta AI products. Follows standard 6-block pattern.
Role: "The Social Graph" — Meta AI access via WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook
integrations and Llama model deployments. Read/advisory only unless Logan
directs otherwise.

### Fictive personas

`.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` get `instructions.md` stubs with
role TBD by Logan. Placeholder content:

```markdown
# [NAME] — IDAHO-VAULT

**Load mechanism:** Manual injection by Logan.
[...]
**Role:** [Pending Logan's direction — persona not yet formally defined.]
```

---

## Gitignore

**Rule:** IDE/runtime dotfolders are ignored. Agent governance dotfolders are tracked.

| Folder | Status | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.vscode/` | Already gitignored (line 14) | None |
| `.qodo/` | Empty, not in `.gitignore` | Add to `.gitignore` (housekeeping) |
| `.venv/` | Already gitignored | None |
| `.gemini/`, `.codex/`, `.grok/`, etc. | New governance folders | Must be tracked — verify no wildcard catches them |
| `.slack/` | Slack CLI project config | Track (governance/config, not runtime) |

No existing `.gitignore` wildcard rule will catch the new agent folders. The
`.gitignore` ignores named folders explicitly, not by pattern. Safe to proceed.

---

## Execution Order

1. Add `.qodo/` to `.gitignore`
2. `git mv CLAUDE.md .claude/CLAUDE.md`
3. `git mv GEMINI.md .gemini/GEMINI.md` + create `.gemini/settings.json`
4. `git mv Perplexity.md .perplexity/instructions.md`
5. `git rm Grok.md`
6. Create remaining new folders + files:
   `.codex/`, `.grok/`, `.deepseek/`, `.microsoft/`,
   `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/`, `.meta/`
7. Create root `AGENTS.md` (thin pointer to `!/AGENTS.md`)
8. Flag `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` to Logan before touching
9. Single commit on `claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture` branch

---

## Files Modified / Created

| Path | Status |
| --- | --- |
| `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Moved from `CLAUDE.md` |
| `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Moved from `GEMINI.md` |
| `.gemini/settings.json` | New stub |
| `.codex/config.toml` | New stub |
| `.codex/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.grok/GROK.md` | New governance shim |
| `.deepseek/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.perplexity/instructions.md` | Moved from `Perplexity.md` |
| `.google/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Drive, Workspace, Gemini web/API) |
| `.microsoft/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Copilot, M365, Azure OpenAI, Bing, Copilot Studio) |
| `.meta/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Meta AI, Llama, Meta AI Studio) |
| `.bartimaeus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.zagreus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.persephone/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `AGENTS.md` (root) | New — thin pointer to `!/AGENTS.md` |
| `.slack/hooks.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project hooks |
| `.slack/config.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project config |
| `.pr_agent.toml` | New stub — Qodo PR review config |
| `.codiumai.toml` | New stub — Qodo test generation config |
| `.coderabbit.yaml` | New stub — CodeRabbit review config |
| `canva-app.json` | New stub — Canva CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `box.json` | New stub — Box CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `CLAUDE.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.claude/`) |
| `GEMINI.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.gemini/`) |
| `Perplexity.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.perplexity/`) |
| `Grok.md` (root) | Deleted (empty, replaced by `.grok/`) |

---

## Open Questions for Logan

1. **`CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md`** at root — archive copies of old CLAUDE.md.
   Delete or move to `!/` archive?
2. **Fictive persona roles** — `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` stubs
   will have placeholder role text. Logan should define canonical roles before
   or after this PR.
3. **`.meta/` role** — assigned "The Social Graph" as placeholder. Logan should
   confirm or redefine before or after this PR.
4. **`.grok/` auto-load status** — the official xAI Grok (the LLM) has no
   confirmed CLI dotfolder convention. The `.grok/GROK.md` claim came from a
   community project. Treat as manual injection until confirmed otherwise.

# Plan: Agent Dotfolder Architecture

## Context

Agent instruction files currently live at vault root (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`,
`Perplexity.md`, `Grok.md`). This creates disambiguation collisions with vault
notes (`codex.md`), and doesn't follow the established dotfolder convention
already used by `.git/`, `.github/`, `.obsidian/`, `.claude/`, `.vscode/`, `.qodo/`.

The fix: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder. Files inside are invisible to
Obsidian's note graph, can't collide with vault notes, and each folder can grow
independently (settings, levelsets, context bundles). `!/` becomes the shared
commons all agents draw from — hub-and-spoke.

---

## Official Auto-Load Status (per tool documentation)

| Tool | Dotfolder | Auto-load file | Auto-loaded? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official |
| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/config.toml` | Yes — official |
| Grok (xAI) | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Claimed — source uncertain |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official (already done) |
| Qodo (PR review) | repo root | `.pr_agent.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (test gen) | repo root | `.codiumai.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (agents) | repo root | `agent.toml` + `agents/*.toml` | Yes — official |
| CodeRabbit | repo root | `.coderabbit.yaml` | Yes — official |
| Slack CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/hooks.json` + `.slack/config.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Canva CLI | repo root | `canva-app.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Box CLI | repo root | `box.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Deepseek | `.deepseek/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Microsoft (non-Copilot) | `.microsoft/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Meta AI / Llama | `.meta/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Linear | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Google Workspace / Gemini web | `.google/` | manual injection shim | No official CLI dotfolder; shim created by convention |
| Hugging Face | none (project) | n/a | User cache only |
| Fictive personas | `.bartimaeus/` `.zagreus/` `.persephone/` | none | Manual injection |

**Cross-tool standard:** `AGENTS.md` at repo root is auto-loaded by OpenAI Codex,
GitHub Copilot, and Qodo. Currently only `!/AGENTS.md` exists — create a thin
root-level `AGENTS.md` as a pointer.

---

## Folder Structure (target state)

```text
.claude/
  CLAUDE.md          ← moved from root (official auto-load)
  rules/             ← optional: modular rules auto-loaded by Claude Code
  settings.json      ← already exists
  settings.local.json ← already exists

.gemini/
  GEMINI.md          ← moved from root GEMINI.md (official auto-load)
  settings.json      ← stub (Gemini CLI config)

.codex/
  config.toml        ← stub (official Codex CLI config)
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for OpenAI Codex agents

.grok/
  GROK.md            ← governance shim (matches claimed convention)

.deepseek/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim (manual injection)

.perplexity/
  instructions.md    ← moved from root Perplexity.md

.microsoft/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for full Microsoft AI surface:
                        GitHub Copilot (chat/CLI), Microsoft Copilot (M365),
                        Azure OpenAI, Bing AI, Copilot Studio

.google/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Google ecosystem:
                        Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive,
                        Google Workspace, Gemini (web/API, distinct from CLI)

.meta/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Meta AI surface:
                        Meta AI (WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook), Llama models,
                        Meta AI Studio

.bartimaeus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.zagreus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.persephone/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.slack/
  hooks.json         ← Slack CLI project hooks (auto-loaded by Slack CLI)
  config.json        ← Slack CLI project config

AGENTS.md            ← NEW at root: thin cross-tool pointer to !/AGENTS.md
.pr_agent.toml       ← NEW: Qodo PR review config (auto-loaded)
.codiumai.toml       ← NEW: Qodo test generation config (auto-loaded)
.coderabbit.yaml     ← NEW: CodeRabbit review config (auto-loaded)
canva-app.json       ← NEW: Canva CLI app config (if Canva CLI used)
box.json             ← NEW: Box CLI config (if Box CLI used)
```

---

## Root Cleanup

| File | Action | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | `git mv` → `.claude/CLAUDE.md`, delete root | Official path is `.claude/CLAUDE.md` |
| `GEMINI.md` | `git mv` → `.gemini/GEMINI.md`, delete root | Official path is `.gemini/GEMINI.md` |
| `Perplexity.md` | `git mv` → `.perplexity/instructions.md`, delete root | No auto-load; move to dotfolder |
| `Grok.md` | `git rm` | Empty file (0 bytes); replaced by `.grok/GROK.md` |
| `codex.md` | Leave untouched | Existing vault note — not an agent file |
| `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` | Flag for Logan | Archive copies — Logan decides keep/delete |

---

## File Contents

### Standard shim structure (all non-auto-load files)

Every `instructions.md` / `GROK.md` / etc. follows the 6-block pattern:

1. **Load mechanism** — honest auto-load OR manual injection statement
2. **Identity header** — owner / repo / platform
3. **Governance** — defers to `!/CONSTITUTION.md`; declares capability tier
4. **Role** — agent persona, one paragraph
5. **Conventions pointer** — `See !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md`
6. **See Also** — flat list pointing to `!/` commons

Target: 30–45 lines per file.

### `.codex/config.toml` stub

```toml
# OpenAI Codex CLI project configuration
# See https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-reference
# Governance shim: .codex/instructions.md
# Shared conventions: !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md
```

### `.gemini/settings.json` stub

```json
{
  "// governance": "See .gemini/GEMINI.md and !/CONSTITUTION.md"
}
```

### `.meta/instructions.md`

Governance shim for Meta AI products. Follows standard 6-block pattern.
Role: "The Social Graph" — Meta AI access via WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook
integrations and Llama model deployments. Read/advisory only unless Logan
directs otherwise.

### Fictive personas

`.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` get `instructions.md` stubs with
role TBD by Logan. Placeholder content:

```markdown
# [NAME] — IDAHO-VAULT

**Load mechanism:** Manual injection by Logan.
[...]
**Role:** [Pending Logan's direction — persona not yet formally defined.]
```

---

## Gitignore

**Rule:** IDE/runtime dotfolders are ignored. Agent governance dotfolders are tracked.

| Folder | Status | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.vscode/` | Already gitignored (line 14) | None |
| `.qodo/` | Agentic tool workspace — empty currently, not in `.gitignore` | Track (agentic, not runtime); no change needed |
| `.venv/` | Already gitignored | None |
| `.gemini/`, `.codex/`, `.grok/`, etc. | New governance folders | Must be tracked — verify no wildcard catches them |
| `.slack/` | Slack CLI project config | Track (governance/config, not runtime) |

No existing `.gitignore` wildcard rule will catch the new agent folders. The
`.gitignore` ignores named folders explicitly, not by pattern. Safe to proceed.

---

## Execution Order

1. Add `.qodo/` to `.gitignore`
2. `git mv CLAUDE.md .claude/CLAUDE.md`
3. `git mv GEMINI.md .gemini/GEMINI.md` + create `.gemini/settings.json`
4. `git mv Perplexity.md .perplexity/instructions.md`
5. `git rm Grok.md`
6. Create remaining new dotfolders + governance shims:
   `.codex/`, `.grok/`, `.deepseek/`, `.microsoft/`, `.google/`,
   `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/`, `.meta/`
7. Create `.slack/` stubs
8. Create root-level config stubs: `AGENTS.md`, `.pr_agent.toml`, `.codiumai.toml`,
   `.coderabbit.yaml`, `canva-app.json`, `box.json`
9. Flag `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` to Logan before touching
10. Single commit on `claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture` branch

---

## Files Modified / Created

| Path | Status |
| --- | --- |
| `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Moved from `CLAUDE.md` |
| `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Moved from `GEMINI.md` |
| `.gemini/settings.json` | New stub |
| `.codex/config.toml` | New stub |
| `.codex/instructions.md` | New governance shim |

| `.microsoft/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Copilot, M365, Azure OpenAI, Bing, Copilot Studio) |

content.thinking:
Good questions:

1. Should `.gemini` be merged into `.google`? This is an interesting question. Gemini CLI is a separate command-line tool with its own auto-load convention (`.gemini/GEMINI.md`). Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, etc.) would be in `.google/`. The question is whether to merge them.

Arguments for keeping them separate:
- `.gemini/` has official CLI auto-load support — it needs to be its own dotfolder for technical reasons
- Google Workspace services (Gmail, Calendar) are distinct from Gemini the AI

Arguments for merging:
- Both are Google products


- Simpler organization overall
- `.google/` could contain subdirectories or separate files for CLI versus web access

But there's a technical constraint I need to consider: Gemini CLI specifically auto-loads `.gemini/GEMINI.md`, so if I merge into `.google/`, the CLI won't find it unless that path still exists. I could create a symlink, but that adds complexity. I think the cleaner approach is keeping them separate — `.gemini/` serves a specific technical auto-load requirement while `.google/` acts as a governance layer for the broader Google ecosystem.

2. Pinpoint and NotebookLM are also Google products, so I need to think about where they fit.

Pinpoint is Google's journalism research tool for analyzing large document sets, and NotebookLM is an AI-powered note-taking platform — both are SaaS tools without local config conventions or CLI support. Since they're Google products, they'd naturally fall under the `.google/` governance structure even though they don't have the same technical requirements as Gemini.

content.text:
Good questions. Let me think through `.gemini` vs `.google` carefully before updating:

**The technical constraint:** Gemini CLI auto-loads `.gemini/GEMINI.md` specifically — that path is hard-wired. Merging into `.google/` would break the auto-load unless we kept `.gemini/` as well.

**The logical split:**
- `.gemini/` — **Gemini CLI** (the coding agent tool, auto-load required)
- `.google/` — **Google ecosystem services** (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Workspace, Pinpoint, NotebookLM — all SaaS, manual injection)

These are genuinely different things. Gemini CLI ≠ Google Workspace. Merging them would either break the CLI auto-load or create confusion about what the folder is for.

**My recommendation:** Keep them separate, but make the distinction explicit in both files.

**On Pinpoint and NotebookLM:** Both are Google SaaS journalism/research tools — no CLI, no local config convention. They fold into `.google/instructions.md` naturally alongside Gmail and Calendar.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Plan: Agent Dotfolder Architecture

## Context

Agent instruction files currently live at vault root (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`,
`Perplexity.md`, `Grok.md`). This creates disambiguation collisions with vault
notes (`codex.md`), and doesn't follow the established dotfolder convention
already used by `.git/`, `.github/`, `.obsidian/`, `.claude/`, `.vscode/`, `.qodo/`.

The fix: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder. Files inside are invisible to
Obsidian's note graph, can't collide with vault notes, and each folder can grow
independently (settings, levelsets, context bundles). `!/` becomes the shared
commons all agents draw from — hub-and-spoke.

---

## Official Auto-Load Status (per tool documentation)

| Tool | Dotfolder | Auto-load file | Auto-loaded? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official |
| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/config.toml` | Yes — official |
| Grok (xAI) | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Claimed — source uncertain |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official (already done) |
| Qodo (PR review) | repo root | `.pr_agent.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (test gen) | repo root | `.codiumai.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (agents) | repo root | `agent.toml` + `agents/*.toml` | Yes — official |
| CodeRabbit | repo root | `.coderabbit.yaml` | Yes — official |
| Slack CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/hooks.json` + `.slack/config.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Canva CLI | repo root | `canva-app.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Box CLI | repo root | `box.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Deepseek | `.deepseek/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Microsoft (non-Copilot) | `.microsoft/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Meta AI / Llama | `.meta/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Linear | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Google Workspace / Gemini web | `.google/` | manual injection shim | No official CLI dotfolder; shim created by convention |
| Hugging Face | none (project) | n/a | User cache only |
| Fictive personas | `.bartimaeus/` `.zagreus/` `.persephone/` | none | Manual injection |

**Cross-tool standard:** `AGENTS.md` at repo root is auto-loaded by OpenAI Codex,
GitHub Copilot, and Qodo. Currently only `!/AGENTS.md` exists — create a thin
root-level `AGENTS.md` as a pointer.

---

## Folder Structure (target state)

```text
.claude/
  CLAUDE.md          ← moved from root (official auto-load)
  rules/             ← optional: modular rules auto-loaded by Claude Code
  settings.json      ← already exists
  settings.local.json ← already exists

.gemini/
  GEMINI.md          ← moved from root GEMINI.md (official auto-load)
  settings.json      ← stub (Gemini CLI config)

.codex/
  config.toml        ← stub (official Codex CLI config)
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for OpenAI Codex agents

.grok/
  GROK.md            ← governance shim (matches claimed convention)

.deepseek/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim (manual injection)

.perplexity/
  instructions.md    ← moved from root Perplexity.md

.microsoft/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for full Microsoft AI surface:
                        GitHub Copilot (chat/CLI), Microsoft Copilot (M365),
                        Azure OpenAI, Bing AI, Copilot Studio

.google/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Google ecosystem:
                        Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive,
                        Google Workspace, Gemini (web/API, distinct from CLI)

.meta/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Meta AI surface:
                        Meta AI (WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook), Llama models,
                        Meta AI Studio

.bartimaeus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.zagreus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.persephone/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.slack/
  hooks.json         ← Slack CLI project hooks (auto-loaded by Slack CLI)
  config.json        ← Slack CLI project config

AGENTS.md            ← NEW at root: thin cross-tool pointer to !/AGENTS.md
.pr_agent.toml       ← NEW: Qodo PR review config (auto-loaded)
.codiumai.toml       ← NEW: Qodo test generation config (auto-loaded)
.coderabbit.yaml     ← NEW: CodeRabbit review config (auto-loaded)
canva-app.json       ← NEW: Canva CLI app config (if Canva CLI used)
box.json             ← NEW: Box CLI config (if Box CLI used)
```

---

## Root Cleanup

| File | Action | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | `git mv` → `.claude/CLAUDE.md`, delete root | Official path is `.claude/CLAUDE.md` |
| `GEMINI.md` | `git mv` → `.gemini/GEMINI.md`, delete root | Official path is `.gemini/GEMINI.md` |
| `Perplexity.md` | `git mv` → `.perplexity/instructions.md`, delete root | No auto-load; move to dotfolder |
| `Grok.md` | `git rm` | Empty file (0 bytes); replaced by `.grok/GROK.md` |
| `codex.md` | Leave untouched | Existing vault note — not an agent file |
| `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` | Flag for Logan | Archive copies — Logan decides keep/delete |

---

## File Contents

### Standard shim structure (all non-auto-load files)

Every `instructions.md` / `GROK.md` / etc. follows the 6-block pattern:

1. **Load mechanism** — honest auto-load OR manual injection statement
2. **Identity header** — owner / repo / platform
3. **Governance** — defers to `!/CONSTITUTION.md`; declares capability tier
4. **Role** — agent persona, one paragraph
5. **Conventions pointer** — `See !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md`
6. **See Also** — flat list pointing to `!/` commons

Target: 30–45 lines per file.

### `.codex/config.toml` stub

```toml
# OpenAI Codex CLI project configuration
# See https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-reference
# Governance shim: .codex/instructions.md
# Shared conventions: !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md
```

### `.gemini/settings.json` stub

```json
{
  "// governance": "See .gemini/GEMINI.md and !/CONSTITUTION.md"
}
```

### `.meta/instructions.md`

Governance shim for Meta AI products. Follows standard 6-block pattern.
Role: "The Social Graph" — Meta AI access via WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook
integrations and Llama model deployments. Read/advisory only unless Logan
directs otherwise.

### Fictive personas

`.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` get `instructions.md` stubs with
role TBD by Logan. Placeholder content:

```markdown
# [NAME] — IDAHO-VAULT

**Load mechanism:** Manual injection by Logan.
[...]
**Role:** [Pending Logan's direction — persona not yet formally defined.]
```

---

## Gitignore

**Rule:** IDE/runtime dotfolders are ignored. Agent governance dotfolders are tracked.

| Folder | Status | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.vscode/` | Already gitignored (line 14) | None |
| `.qodo/` | Agentic tool workspace — empty currently, not in `.gitignore` | Track (agentic, not runtime); no change needed |
| `.venv/` | Already gitignored | None |
| `.gemini/`, `.codex/`, `.grok/`, etc. | New governance folders | Must be tracked — verify no wildcard catches them |
| `.slack/` | Slack CLI project config | Track (governance/config, not runtime) |

No existing `.gitignore` wildcard rule will catch the new agent folders. The
`.gitignore` ignores named folders explicitly, not by pattern. Safe to proceed.

---

## Execution Order

1. `git mv CLAUDE.md .claude/CLAUDE.md`
3. `git mv GEMINI.md .gemini/GEMINI.md` + create `.gemini/settings.json`
4. `git mv Perplexity.md .perplexity/instructions.md`
5. `git rm Grok.md`
6. Create remaining new dotfolders + governance shims:
   `.codex/`, `.grok/`, `.deepseek/`, `.microsoft/`, `.google/`,
   `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/`, `.meta/`
7. Create `.slack/` stubs
8. Create root-level config stubs: `AGENTS.md`, `.pr_agent.toml`, `.codiumai.toml`,
   `.coderabbit.yaml`, `canva-app.json`, `box.json`
9. Flag `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` to Logan before touching
10. Single commit on `claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture` branch

---

## Files Modified / Created

| Path | Status |
| --- | --- |
| `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Moved from `CLAUDE.md` |
| `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Moved from `GEMINI.md` |
| `.gemini/settings.json` | New stub |
| `.codex/config.toml` | New stub |
| `.codex/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.grok/GROK.md` | New governance shim |
| `.deepseek/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.perplexity/instructions.md` | Moved from `Perplexity.md` |
| `.google/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Drive, Workspace, Gemini web/API) |
| `.microsoft/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Copilot, M365, Azure OpenAI, Bing, Copilot Studio) |
| `.meta/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Meta AI, Llama, Meta AI Studio) |
| `.bartimaeus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.zagreus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.persephone/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `AGENTS.md` (root) | New — thin pointer to `!/AGENTS.md` |
| `.slack/hooks.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project hooks |
| `.slack/config.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project config |
| `.pr_agent.toml` | New stub — Qodo PR review config |
| `.codiumai.toml` | New stub — Qodo test generation config |
| `.coderabbit.yaml` | New stub — CodeRabbit review config |
| `canva-app.json` | New stub — Canva CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `box.json` | New stub — Box CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `CLAUDE.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.claude/`) |
| `GEMINI.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.gemini/`) |
| `Perplexity.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.perplexity/`) |
| `Grok.md` (root) | Deleted (empty, replaced by `.grok/`) |

---

## Open Questions for Logan

1. **`CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md`** at root — archive copies of old CLAUDE.md.
   Delete or move to `!/` archive?
2. **Fictive persona roles** — `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` stubs
   will have placeholder role text. Logan should define canonical roles before
   or after this PR.
3. **`.meta/` role** — assigned "The Social Graph" as placeholder. Logan should
   confirm or redefine before or after this PR.
4. **`.grok/` auto-load status** — the official xAI Grok (the LLM) has no
   confirmed CLI dotfolder convention. The `.grok/GROK.md` claim came from a
   community project. Treat as manual injection until confirmed otherwise.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Plan: Agent Dotfolder Architecture

## Context

Agent instruction files currently live at vault root (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`,
`Perplexity.md`, `Grok.md`). This creates disambiguation collisions with vault
notes (`codex.md`), and doesn't follow the established dotfolder convention
already used by `.git/`, `.github/`, `.obsidian/`, `.claude/`, `.vscode/`, `.qodo/`.

The fix: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder. Files inside are invisible to
Obsidian's note graph, can't collide with vault notes, and each folder can grow
independently (settings, levelsets, context bundles). `!/` becomes the shared
commons all agents draw from — hub-and-spoke.

---

## Official Auto-Load Status (per tool documentation)

| Tool | Dotfolder | Auto-load file | Auto-loaded? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official |
| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/config.toml` | Yes — official |
| Grok (xAI) | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Claimed — source uncertain |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official (already done) |
| Qodo (PR review) | repo root | `.pr_agent.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (test gen) | repo root | `.codiumai.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (agents) | repo root | `agent.toml` + `agents/*.toml` | Yes — official |
| CodeRabbit | repo root | `.coderabbit.yaml` | Yes — official |
| Slack CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/hooks.json` + `.slack/config.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Canva CLI | repo root | `canva-app.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Box CLI | repo root | `box.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Deepseek | `.deepseek/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Microsoft (non-Copilot) | `.microsoft/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Meta AI / Llama | `.meta/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Linear | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Google Workspace / Gemini web | `.google/` | manual injection shim | No official CLI dotfolder; shim by convention. Covers Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Workspace, Pinpoint, NotebookLM, Gemini web/API |
| Hugging Face | none (project) | n/a | User cache only |
| Fictive personas | `.bartimaeus/` `.zagreus/` `.persephone/` | none | Manual injection |

**Cross-tool standard:** `AGENTS.md` at repo root is auto-loaded by OpenAI Codex,
GitHub Copilot, and Qodo. Currently only `!/AGENTS.md` exists — create a thin
root-level `AGENTS.md` as a pointer.

---

  GEMINI.md          ← moved from root GEMINI.md (official auto-load)
  settings.json      ← stub (Gemini CLI config)

  GROK.md            ← governance shim (matches claimed convention)

.deepseek/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim (manual injection)

  instructions.md    ← moved from root Perplexity.md

.microsoft/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for full Microsoft AI surface:
                        GitHub Copilot (chat/CLI), Microsoft Copilot (M365),
                        Azure OpenAI, Bing AI, Copilot Studio

.google/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Google ecosystem:
                        Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive,
                        Google Workspace, Gemini (web/API, distinct from CLI)

.meta/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Meta AI surface:
                        Meta AI (WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook), Llama models,
                        Meta AI Studio

.bartimaeus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.zagreus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.persephone/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

content.text: On the `.gemini` vs `.google` question: **keep them separate.** The technical reason is that Gemini CLI hard-wires `.gemini/GEMINI.md` as its auto-load path — merging into `.google/` would break that. The conceptual split also holds: `.gemini/` = Gemini as a **coding agent tool** (CLI), `.google/` = Google as a **service ecosystem** (SaaS, manual injection). Pinpoint and NotebookLM land in `.google/`.

## File Contents

### Standard shim structure (all non-auto-load files)

Every `instructions.md` / `GROK.md` / etc. follows the 6-block pattern:

1. **Load mechanism** — honest auto-load OR manual injection statement
2. **Identity header** — owner / repo / platform
3. **Governance** — defers to `!/CONSTITUTION.md`; declares capability tier
4. **Role** — agent persona, one paragraph
5. **Conventions pointer** — `See !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md`

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   Logan Finney (journalist, Idaho Reports/Idaho Public Television) is formalizing the multi-agent governance architecture of IDAHO-VAULT, an Obsidian.md vault version-controlled with git. The session covered:
   - Moving `swarm/` folder from vault root into `!/` (completed, merged)
   - Branch housekeeping — deleting stale/merged branches (completed)
   - Obsidian plugin sync across Desktop/Mobile via Obsidian Sync (resolved, documented)
   - Formalizing agent instruction files to a standard thin-shim pattern (PR pushed, pending merge)
   - Planning a full agent dotfolder architecture: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder (`.claude/`, `.gemini/`, `.codex/`, etc.), root agent files removed, all agents draw shared resources from `!/` as a hub — **currently in plan mode, not yet approved/executed**
   - Last active question from Logan: "Does this properly handle Microsoft? Personal copilot account vs M365 work-managed profile?"

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Obsidian.md vault with git version control (public repo: github.com/loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT)
   - Multi-agent swarm system: Claude Code, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Grok, Qodo, CodeRabbit, Deepseek, Perplexity, Meta AI, Microsoft Copilot, Google ecosystem
   - Dotfolder convention: agent config lives in `.agentname/` (invisible to Obsidian graph, no vault note collisions)
   - Hub-and-spoke: `!/` is the shared commons (CONSTITUTION.md, VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md, AGENTS.md, DECISIONS.md, DOCKET.md); each agent dotfolder points to it
   - Auto-load vs manual injection distinction: Claude Code (`.claude/CLAUDE.md`), Gemini CLI (`.gemini/GEMINI.md`), Codex CLI (`.codex/config.toml`), Copilot (`.github/copilot-instructions.md`) are genuine auto-loads; others are manual injection
   - `AGENTS.md` at root: cross-tool standard auto-loaded by Codex, Copilot, and Qodo
   - Gitignore principle: IDE/runtime dotfolders ignored (`.venv/`, `.vscode/`); agent governance dotfolders tracked (`.claude/`, `.gemini/`, `.qodo/`, etc.)
   - `.gemini/` and `.google/` kept separate: `.gemini/` = Gemini CLI coding agent (auto-load required); `.google/` = Google SaaS ecosystem (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Workspace, Pinpoint, NotebookLM, Gemini web/API)
   - Obsidian Sync / Git boundary: Sync owns encrypted plugin settings (data.json, credentials); Git owns vault content and plugin presence. `.obsidian/plugins/*/data.json` wildcard gitignore is the firewall.
   - Qodo: uses root-level `.pr_agent.toml`, `.codiumai.toml`, `agent.toml` (not `.qodo/` for project config); `.qodo/` is user-level agentic workspace, tracked not ignored
   - CodeRabbit: `.coderabbit.yaml` at root, auto-loaded
   - Standard 6-block shim structure for all agent instruction files

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - `swarm/` → `!/swarm/` (git mv completed, PR #72 merged)
     - Contains: `logs/.gitkeep`, `state/run_state.md`, `state/stabilization_plan.md`, `state/archive/`, `tools/state_manager.py`
     - `state_manager.py` uses `Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]` — self-relative, no hardcoding needed

   - `CLAUDE.md` (rewritten)

     - Added: capability tier declaration ("Direct Write per !/AGENTS.md"), automation pointer to VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md, CODEX.md and PERPLEXITY.md to See Also list

   - `GEMINI.md` (rewritten — 225 → ~50 lines)

   - **Gemini.md case-duplicate**: Windows filesystem doesn't distinguish `GEMINI.md` from `Gemini.md`. Both were tracked. Fixed with `git rm --cached Gemini.md` to remove the duplicate.

   - **Agent file disambiguation**: Root cause identified — vault notes and agent config files share namespace at root. Solution: dotfolders per tool. `codex.md` collision already exists (vault note vs Codex agent file)

CLAUDE.md should move into its dotDir, and set up similar folders that comply with their official documentation for: ChatGPT, Gemini, Deepseek, Perplexity, Grok, Microsoft. input.new_string:
## Root Cleanup

Root `.md` files become **vault notes about the agents** (not agent directions). The operational instruction content moves into the dotfolder. The root file is repurposed/rewritten as a vault entry — so wikilinks like `[[CLAUDE]]`, `[[GEMINI]]`, `[[Perplexity]]` remain valid in the Obsidian graph.

| File | Action | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Repurpose as vault note; copy content to `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Root = Obsidian entity note about Claude persona; dotfolder = operational shim |
| `GEMINI.md` | Repurpose as vault note; copy content to `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Same pattern |
| `Perplexity.md` | Repurpose as vault note; copy content to `.perplexity/instructions.md` | Same pattern |
| `Grok.md` | Expand from empty stub into minimal vault note about Grok | Currently 0 bytes — add frontmatter + one-paragraph entity description |
| `codex.md` | Leave untouched | Existing vault note (DEFINE / terms) — not an agent file |
| `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` | Flag for Logan | Archive copies — Logan decides keep/move to `!/` |

### Vault note content (root files after repurpose)

Each repurposed root file gets:
- YAML frontmatter: `tags: [agents, ai]` + role alias
- One paragraph: who this agent is in the vault, what it does, capability tier
- Wikilinks to `[[CONSTITUTION]]`, `[[AGENTS]]`, related agent notes
- No operational instructions (those live in the dotfolder)
- A pointer: `Operational instructions: see [.agentname/filename]`

This preserves the Obsidian graph (all existing `[[CLAUDE]]` wikilinks stay valid) while cleanly separating vault-note identity from agent operational config.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Plan: Agent Dotfolder Architecture

## Context

Agent instruction files currently live at vault root (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`,
`Perplexity.md`, `Grok.md`). This creates disambiguation collisions with vault
notes (`codex.md`), and doesn't follow the established dotfolder convention
already used by `.git/`, `.github/`, `.obsidian/`, `.claude/`, `.vscode/`, `.qodo/`.

The fix: each AI tool gets its own dotfolder. Files inside are invisible to
Obsidian's note graph, can't collide with vault notes, and each folder can grow
independently (settings, levelsets, context bundles). `!/` becomes the shared
commons all agents draw from — hub-and-spoke.

---

## Official Auto-Load Status (per tool documentation)

| Tool | Dotfolder | Auto-load file | Auto-loaded? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official |
| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/config.toml` | Yes — official |
| Grok (xAI) | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Claimed — source uncertain |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official (already done) |
| Qodo (PR review) | repo root | `.pr_agent.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (test gen) | repo root | `.codiumai.toml` | Yes — official |
| Qodo (agents) | repo root | `agent.toml` + `agents/*.toml` | Yes — official |
| CodeRabbit | repo root | `.coderabbit.yaml` | Yes — official |
| Slack CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/hooks.json` + `.slack/config.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Canva CLI | repo root | `canva-app.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Box CLI | repo root | `box.json` | Yes — official CLI |
| Deepseek | `.deepseek/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Microsoft (non-Copilot) | `.microsoft/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Meta AI / Llama | `.meta/` | none official | Manual injection |
| Linear | none | n/a | SaaS only — no local config |
| Google Workspace / Gemini web | `.google/` | manual injection shim | No official CLI dotfolder; shim by convention. Covers Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Workspace, Pinpoint, NotebookLM, Gemini web/API |
| Hugging Face | none (project) | n/a | User cache only |
| Fictive personas | `.bartimaeus/` `.zagreus/` `.persephone/` | none | Manual injection |

**Cross-tool standard:** `AGENTS.md` at repo root is auto-loaded by OpenAI Codex,
GitHub Copilot, and Qodo. Currently only `!/AGENTS.md` exists — create a thin
root-level `AGENTS.md` as a pointer.

---

## Folder Structure (target state)

```text
.claude/
  CLAUDE.md          ← moved from root (official auto-load)
  rules/             ← optional: modular rules auto-loaded by Claude Code
  settings.json      ← already exists
  settings.local.json ← already exists

.gemini/
  GEMINI.md          ← moved from root GEMINI.md (official auto-load)
  settings.json      ← stub (Gemini CLI config)

.codex/
  config.toml        ← stub (official Codex CLI config)
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for OpenAI Codex agents

.grok/
  GROK.md            ← governance shim (matches claimed convention)

.deepseek/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim (manual injection)

.perplexity/
  instructions.md    ← moved from root Perplexity.md

.microsoft/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for full Microsoft AI surface:
                        GitHub Copilot (chat/CLI), Microsoft Copilot (M365),
                        Azure OpenAI, Bing AI, Copilot Studio

.google/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Google ecosystem:
                        Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive,
                        Google Workspace, Pinpoint, NotebookLM,
                        Gemini (web/API — distinct from Gemini CLI in .gemini/)

.meta/
  instructions.md    ← governance shim for Meta AI surface:
                        Meta AI (WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook), Llama models,
                        Meta AI Studio

.bartimaeus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.zagreus/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.persephone/
  instructions.md    ← fictive persona shim (manual injection)

.slack/
  hooks.json         ← Slack CLI project hooks (auto-loaded by Slack CLI)
  config.json        ← Slack CLI project config

AGENTS.md            ← NEW at root: thin cross-tool pointer to !/AGENTS.md
.pr_agent.toml       ← NEW: Qodo PR review config (auto-loaded)
.codiumai.toml       ← NEW: Qodo test generation config (auto-loaded)
.coderabbit.yaml     ← NEW: CodeRabbit review config (auto-loaded)
canva-app.json       ← NEW: Canva CLI app config (if Canva CLI used)
box.json             ← NEW: Box CLI config (if Box CLI used)
```

---

## Root Cleanup

| File | Action | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | `git mv` → `.claude/CLAUDE.md`, delete root | Official path is `.claude/CLAUDE.md` |
| `GEMINI.md` | `git mv` → `.gemini/GEMINI.md`, delete root | Official path is `.gemini/GEMINI.md` |
| `Perplexity.md` | `git mv` → `.perplexity/instructions.md`, delete root | No auto-load; move to dotfolder |
| `Grok.md` | `git rm` | Empty file (0 bytes); replaced by `.grok/GROK.md` |
| `codex.md` | Leave untouched | Existing vault note — not an agent file |
| `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` | Flag for Logan | Archive copies — Logan decides keep/delete |

---

## File Contents

### Standard shim structure (all non-auto-load files)

Every `instructions.md` / `GROK.md` / etc. follows the 6-block pattern:

1. **Load mechanism** — honest auto-load OR manual injection statement
2. **Identity header** — owner / repo / platform
3. **Governance** — defers to `!/CONSTITUTION.md`; declares capability tier
4. **Role** — agent persona, one paragraph
5. **Conventions pointer** — `See !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md`
6. **See Also** — flat list pointing to `!/` commons

Target: 30–45 lines per file.

### `.codex/config.toml` stub

```toml
# OpenAI Codex CLI project configuration
# See https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-reference
# Governance shim: .codex/instructions.md
# Shared conventions: !/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md
```

### `.gemini/settings.json` stub

```json
{
  "// governance": "See .gemini/GEMINI.md and !/CONSTITUTION.md"
}
```

### `.meta/instructions.md`

Governance shim for Meta AI products. Follows standard 6-block pattern.
Role: "The Social Graph" — Meta AI access via WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook
integrations and Llama model deployments. Read/advisory only unless Logan
directs otherwise.

### Fictive personas

`.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` get `instructions.md` stubs with
role TBD by Logan. Placeholder content:

```markdown
# [NAME] — IDAHO-VAULT

**Load mechanism:** Manual injection by Logan.
[...]
**Role:** [Pending Logan's direction — persona not yet formally defined.]
```

---

## Gitignore

**Rule:** IDE/runtime dotfolders are ignored. Agent governance dotfolders are tracked.

| Folder | Status | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.vscode/` | Already gitignored (line 14) | None |
| `.qodo/` | Agentic tool workspace — empty currently, not in `.gitignore` | Track (agentic, not runtime); no change needed |
| `.venv/` | Already gitignored | None |
| `.gemini/`, `.codex/`, `.grok/`, etc. | New governance folders | Must be tracked — verify no wildcard catches them |
| `.slack/` | Slack CLI project config | Track (governance/config, not runtime) |

No existing `.gitignore` wildcard rule will catch the new agent folders. The
`.gitignore` ignores named folders explicitly, not by pattern. Safe to proceed.

---

## Execution Order

1. `git mv CLAUDE.md .claude/CLAUDE.md`
2. `git mv GEMINI.md .gemini/GEMINI.md` + create `.gemini/settings.json`
3. `git mv Perplexity.md .perplexity/instructions.md`
4. `git rm Grok.md`
5. Create remaining new dotfolders + governance shims:
   `.codex/`, `.grok/`, `.deepseek/`, `.microsoft/`, `.google/`,
   `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/`, `.meta/`
6. Create `.slack/` stubs
7. Create root-level config stubs: `AGENTS.md`, `.pr_agent.toml`, `.codiumai.toml`,
   `.coderabbit.yaml`, `canva-app.json`, `box.json`
8. Flag `CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md` to Logan before touching
9. Single commit on `claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture` branch

---

## Files Modified / Created

| Path | Status |
| --- | --- |
| `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Moved from `CLAUDE.md` |
| `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Moved from `GEMINI.md` |
| `.gemini/settings.json` | New stub |
| `.codex/config.toml` | New stub |
| `.codex/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.grok/GROK.md` | New governance shim |
| `.deepseek/instructions.md` | New governance shim |
| `.perplexity/instructions.md` | Moved from `Perplexity.md` |
| `.google/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Drive, Workspace, Gemini web/API) |
| `.microsoft/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Copilot, M365, Azure OpenAI, Bing, Copilot Studio) |
| `.meta/instructions.md` | New governance shim (Meta AI, Llama, Meta AI Studio) |
| `.bartimaeus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.zagreus/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `.persephone/instructions.md` | New stub (role TBD by Logan) |
| `AGENTS.md` (root) | New — thin pointer to `!/AGENTS.md` |
| `.slack/hooks.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project hooks |
| `.slack/config.json` | New stub — Slack CLI project config |
| `.pr_agent.toml` | New stub — Qodo PR review config |
| `.codiumai.toml` | New stub — Qodo test generation config |
| `.coderabbit.yaml` | New stub — CodeRabbit review config |
| `canva-app.json` | New stub — Canva CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `box.json` | New stub — Box CLI (stub only; activate if CLI used) |
| `CLAUDE.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.claude/`) |
| `GEMINI.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.gemini/`) |
| `Perplexity.md` (root) | Deleted (moved to `.perplexity/`) |
| `Grok.md` (root) | Deleted (empty, replaced by `.grok/`) |

---

## Open Questions for Logan

1. **`CLAUDE 1.md` / `CLAUDE 2.md`** at root — archive copies of old CLAUDE.md.
   Delete or move to `!/` archive?
2. **Fictive persona roles** — `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` stubs
   will have placeholder role text. Logan should define canonical roles before
   or after this PR.
3. **`.meta/` role** — assigned "The Social Graph" as placeholder. Logan should
   confirm or redefine before or after this PR.
4. **`.grok/` auto-load status** — the official xAI Grok (the LLM) has no
   confirmed CLI dotfolder convention. The `.grok/GROK.md` claim came from a
   community project. Treat as manual injection until confirmed otherwise.
